suggestedTarget: S.UnknownFromJsonString (encode via S.encodeUnknownEffect) — model a SerializedEditorState schema later
note: Serializes a Lexical SerializedEditorState into the LexicalComposer initialConfig.editorState (a string). No schema exists for SerializedEditorState; model schema later. The LexicalComposer config expects a synchronous string, so any S.encode path must resolve eagerly (encodeSync) rather than returning an Effect — flag for human decision on schema modeling and sync-encode boundary.
